title: Claude Fable 5 plays Factorio
summary: Claude Fable 5 autonomously plays Factorio, a factory-building game, by strategizing and constructing an automated factory without human intervention. This demonstrates the model's ability to handle complex sequential decision-making in a real-time strategy environment.
writeup: The video shows Claude Fable 5 playing Factorio, building an automated factory without human intervention. It illustrates the model operating as an agent in a real-time strategy environment, strategizing and constructing systems through sequential decisions. The relevance lies in long-horizon planning: Factorio demands sustained, multi-step coordination rather than isolated actions. The takeaway is a concrete demonstration of autonomous decision-making across an extended task.
